channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Manager Carlos Mendoza among those eagerly anticipating Juan Soto's New York Mets debut
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Juan Soto’s debut with the New York Mets has seemingly the entire baseball world excited. “Yeah, put me in that category too,” manager Carlos Mendoza said Thursday. “I’m excited to watch him today and every day.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WATCH: Phil Martelli Jr. introduced as new VCU head coach
item.description: Phil Martelli Jr. has been named the 14th head coach of the VCU Men’s Basketball team. A press conference is scheduled for 11:30 a.m. on Thursday, March 27.
item.dc:creator: Tannock Blair, PHL 17

item.title: MTS boosts Trolley service for Padres Opening Weekend
item.description: The Friar Faithful will be taking over downtown San Diego on Thursday and into the weekend as the Padres take on the Atlanta Braves, marking the first home games of the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Abdul Carter not working out during Penn State's Pro Day; report
item.description: (WHTM) -- Top 2025 NFL draft prospect Adbul Carter is not going to work out during Penn State's Pro Day Friday, according to a report. Adam Schefter posted on social media that Carter's agent, Drew Rosenhaus, said that Carter is finishing up rehab on his shoulder injury.
item.dc:creator: Jared Weaver, PHL 17

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin glides through tricky course to grab 1st-run lead in slalom at World Cup finals
item.description: SUN VALLEY, Idaho (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin grabbed the first-run slalom lead by rhythmically gliding through a tricky course Thursday at the World Cup finals. The American ski racing standout finished in a time of 52.05 seconds.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Valieva's attorneys accuse WADA of 'procedural fraud,' ask court to revisit her doping case
item.description: Attorneys for Russian figure skater Kamila Valieva are taking her doping case back to court, arguing the World Anti-Doping Agency withheld and altered evidence that could have proven her contamination claim during the hearing that resulted in her four-year suspension.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Do you have any Astros Superstitions? Revisiting rituals on Opening Day
item.description: Astros fans are in need of luck as the team could use all the help and support they can get to win big in Arlington this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Horton, Ana Gonzalez, KPRC 2

item.title: Opening day is here: Juan Soto debuts, Paul Skenes vs Sandy Alcántara, and more
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto, Blake Snell and Clay Holmes debut for new teams, Paul Skenes makes his first opening-day start at age 22 and Sandy Alcántara returns from Tommy John surgery.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Grizzlies teammates separated from each other after shove during timeout
item.description: Desmond Bane and Santi Aldama had to be separated from one another after Bane pushed Aldama during a stoppage of play on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cowboys' Dak Prescott gets caught up in wild trade rumor weeks before draft
item.description: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott was the subject of a wild trade rumor involving the Cleveland Browns on Wednesday ahead of the NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tony Finau out to win second Houston Open
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Tony Finau came into this year after going through two pretty big life events. The first was knee surgery back in December.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Softball: Bonita Vista 3, Mission Hills 1
item.description: A competitive softball matchup between Bonita Vista and Mission Hills in the Mater Dei Invitational at Palomar College.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tiger Woods confirms his relationship with Vanessa Trump in a social media post
item.description: Tiger Woods has confirmed his relationship with the former daughter-in-law of President Donald Trump, publishing two images to social media in a post that said, “Love is in the air.” Woods and Vanessa Trump, who was married to Donald Trump Jr.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation
